$comment: GENERATED — do not edit. Edit tokens/ and run npm run build.
name: @midasnetwork/tokens
description: MIDAS visual theme tokens resolved from DTCG source files.

midas.blue.50.$description: MIDAS blue 50, the lightest blue for subtle chrome and backgrounds.

midas.blue.100.$description: MIDAS blue 100 for light selections and low-emphasis blue surfaces.

midas.blue.200.$description: MIDAS blue 200 for pale brand accents.

midas.blue.300.$description: MIDAS blue 300 for medium-light brand accents.

midas.blue.400.$description: MIDAS blue 400 for focus rings and accessible accents.

midas.blue.500.$description: MIDAS blue 500 for primary brand colour.

midas.blue.600.$description: MIDAS blue 600 for light-mode primary actions and links.

midas.blue.700.$description: MIDAS blue 700 for light-mode primary hover states.

midas.blue.800.$description: MIDAS blue 800 for light-mode active states and deep chrome.

midas.blue.900.$description: MIDAS blue 900 for the deepest brand navy.

midas.teal.100.$description: MIDAS teal 100 for pale secondary accents.

midas.teal.400.$description: MIDAS teal 400 for dark-mode secondary actions.

midas.teal.500.$description: MIDAS teal 500 for light-mode secondary actions.

midas.teal.600.$description: MIDAS teal 600 for secondary hover states.

midas.grey.0.$description: White neutral for surfaces and inverse text.

midas.grey.50.$description: Cool grey 50 for light-mode page backgrounds.

midas.grey.100.$description: Cool grey 100 for alternate light-mode surfaces.

midas.grey.200.$description: Cool grey 200 for decorative hairlines and gridlines.

midas.grey.300.$description: Cool grey 300 for low-emphasis axes and separators.

midas.grey.400.$description: Cool grey 400 for disabled or subdued UI.

midas.grey.450.$description: Muted text grey tuned to clear AA on grey 50.

midas.grey.500.$description: Cool grey 500 for neutral chart and fallback colour.

midas.grey.600.$description: Cool grey 600 for strong muted neutral elements.

midas.grey.700.$description: Cool grey 700 for dark neutral UI.

midas.grey.900.$description: Cool grey 900 for primary light-mode text.

midas.danger.$description: Semantic danger colour. Red appears only in semantic danger roles.

midas.danger-bg.$description: Light danger background for alerts and validation.

midas.danger-text.$description: Danger text colour that contrasts with danger background.

midas.warning-bg.$description: Light warning background for status panels.

midas.warning-text.$description: Warning text colour that contrasts with warning background.

midas.success-bg.$description: Light success background for positive states.

midas.success-text.$description: Success text colour that contrasts with success background.

midas.info.$description: Semantic info colour aligned to MIDAS blue.

midas.info-bg.$description: Light info background for informational panels.

midas.info-text.$description: Info text colour that contrasts with info background.

midas.cat.1.$description: Categorical slot 1. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

midas.cat.2.$description: Categorical slot 2. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

midas.cat.3.$description: Categorical slot 3. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

midas.cat.4.$description: Categorical slot 4. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

midas.cat.5.$description: Categorical slot 5. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

midas.cat.6.$description: Categorical slot 6. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

midas.cat.7.$description: Categorical slot 7. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

midas.cat.8.$description: Categorical slot 8. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

midas.cat.9.$description: Categorical slot 9. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

midas.cat.10.$description: Categorical slot 10. Assign categorical colours by entity, never rank.

midas.cat.other.$description: Categorical fallback. Past slot 10, fold the tail into cat-other.

midas.div.3.$description: Diverging ramp step 3, light orange side.

midas.div.4.$description: Diverging ramp neutral midpoint; never a hue.

midas.div.5.$description: Diverging ramp step 5, light blue side.

color.border.$description: Decorative hairline border. Exempt from contrast gating.

color.border-strong.$description: Control outline border that meets UI contrast.

color.text-muted.$description: Muted text colour tuned for AA contrast.

color.text-inverse.$description: Text on dark or saturated backgrounds.

color.primary-contrast.$description: Text or icon colour on primary backgrounds.

chart.gridline.$description: Recessive chart gridline; intentionally not contrast-gated.

chart.axis.$description: Recessive chart axis; intentionally not contrast-gated.

font.sans.$value: "Inter", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

font.mono.$value: "JetBrains Mono", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, "Cascadia Code", Consolas, monospace
